nasb.text: And he began reasoning to himself, saying, ‘What shall I do, since I have no place to store my crops?’

esv.text: and he thought to himself, ‘What shall I do, for I have nowhere to store my crops?’

cnv.text: 他自己心裡說：‘怎麼辦呢？因為我沒有足夠的地方收藏出產了！’

ccb.text: 于是心里盘算，‘我储藏农产的地方不够了，怎么办呢？’

csbs.text: 他就心里盘算：‘我没有地方储存我的产物了，做什么呢？’
